full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50129

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-50129.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
scap-security-guide-0.1.79-1.0.2.el9.noarch.rpm
scap-security-guide-doc-0.1.79-1.0.2.el9.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
scap-security-guide-0.1.79-1.0.2.el9.noarch.rpm
scap-security-guide-doc-0.1.79-1.0.2.el9.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/scap-security-guide-0.1.79-1.0.2.el9.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[0.1.79-1.0.2]
- Update OL8 STIG to V2R7 [Orabug: 38993174]
- Update OL9 STIG to V1R4 [Orabug: 38993199]
